title: 016/004/015 Code-Aware Tree-sitter Chunking
description: Adds tree-sitter code-aware chunking for CocoIndex Code with a six-language grammar registry, env opt-out, indexer dispatch, tests, docs, and blocked re-index/bench evidence.
blockers: CocoIndex core raises RuntimeError: Operation not permitted (os error 1) during coco.Environment initialization, blocking live re-index and bench
